examples: The official custodianship agreement signed with its custodian;
The caseworkers deemed my mother an "unfit parent" and my sister and I were placed under custodianship of the state.
He has been bestowed with custodianship of the Christian holy sites -- not only in Bethlehem, but in Jerusalem as well -- by the Greek Orthodox patriarch.
From De Gaulle to Chirac, French presidents, enjoying powers that far exceed those of most of the world's 20 or so real monarchs, have rapidly assumed custodianship of la gloire.
